title: pelargonium auritum
intro: Pelargonium auritum, also known as the 'Candy Mint' or 'Candy Geranium', is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium auritum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe digestive issues, due to its antimicrobial and antispasmodic properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, coughs, and other infections, as well as for its calming effects on the nervous system.
